steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The passage establishes a norm (neutron merger bursts last fewer than 2 seconds) and then describes GRB 230307A as lasting 200 seconds—a dramatic departure from expectations. This contrast is the key signal.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Oddity means “something unusual or strange,” which is exactly what the blank requires. It describes something unexpected that deviates from the established norm. The other choices either lack this sense of surprise (incident), refer to chance occurrences (coincidence), or mean temporary relief (reprieve). That matches choice D — D is correct.
